name: jstack
description: Universal JStack delivery, bounded goal-loop, read-only audit, mastery, and MCP evidence workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise delivery, goal loops, and audits for Codex
interface.longDescription: JStack adds five Codex workflows: single-lead development, right-sized specialist subagents, full 11-role team mode, bounded evidence-verified goal loops, and read-only repository audits. It includes MCP quality gates for planning, durable loop state, review, QA, security, audit finalization, release readiness, and mastery.
defaultPrompt: Use /j-stack-dev to run the single-lead workflow.
Use /jstack-subagents for a specialist team or /jstack-full-team for all 11 roles.
Use /jstack-loop for bounded verified goal completion or /jstack-audit for read-only inspection.
